item_text: registrazione -> ritorna — type=decision; label="utente registrato con successo al servizio?"; explanation="checks if the user is registered"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-signupactivity-001 title: user registers and returns to mainactivity module: signupactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running, user is not logged in. test data: valid email, password, and name. test steps: 1. open mainactivity. 2. tap on "registrazione" flow. 3. enter valid email, password, and name. 4. tap on "register" button. 5. tap on "ritorna" flow. expected result: mainactivity should be launched with the user logged in.

item_text: click su lato d'ingrandimento -> ricerca meteo di altre località — type=decision; label="si"; explanation="if the user clicks on the enlargement side."
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-meteo-002 title: user searches for weather in another location module: meteo source pages: 2 preconditions: application is running, user is logged in. test data: valid city name. test steps: 1. open home screen. 2. tap on "weather" button. 3. tap on "click su lato d'ingrandimento". 4. enter a valid city name. expected result: weather information for the entered city should be displayed.

item_text: click su lato d'ingrandimento -> ricerca meteo di altre località — type=decision; label="no"; explanation="if the user does not click on the enlargement side."
